name: community-hps-aurora-glass
title: Aurora Glass
description: Dark glassmorphic deck theme: near-black indigo #06091c pages under a triple mint/periwinkle/violet aurora radial glow, frosted-glass cards (blur(24px) saturate(160%)), mint→blue→violet gradient titles and hero numbers, 20px radii, pure CSS/SVG charts, keyboard-first single-file HTML. Based on https://github.com/lewislulu/html-ppt-skill aurora theme, locked as a single-skin deck plugin. Use for keynotes, pitch decks, tech sharing, or product launches that want a premium night-sky feel.

description_i18n.en: Dark glassmorphic deck theme: near-black indigo #06091c pages under a triple mint/periwinkle/violet aurora radial glow, frosted-glass cards (blur(24px) saturate(160%)), mint→blue→violet gradient titles and hero numbers, 20px radii, pure CSS/SVG charts, keyboard-first single-file HTML. Based on https://github.com/lewislulu/html-ppt-skill aurora theme, locked as a single-skin deck plugin. Use for keynotes, pitch decks, tech sharing, or product launches that want a premium night-sky feel.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 深色毛玻璃幻灯片主题：近黑靛底 #06091c + 薄荷/长春花蓝/紫罗兰三重极光辐射光晕，blur(24px) saturate(160%) 毛玻璃卡片，mint→blue→violet 渐变标题与巨型数字，20px 圆角，纯 CSS/SVG 图表，键盘优先的单文件 HTML。基于 lewislulu/html-ppt-skill 的 aurora 主题锁定为单皮肤 deck 插件，适合追求高级夜空质感的主题演讲、融资路演、技术分享与产品发布。

query.en: Create a {{deckType}} for {{audience}} about {{topic}} with {{slideCount}}, using the Aurora Glass system (the aurora theme from lewislulu/html-ppt-skill, locked as the only skin). Start from the seed example.html and keep its design system exactly as-is, replacing slide content only — never rewrite the styles or the script, and never introduce a color or font outside the locked token sheet. Visual contract: near-black indigo --bg:#06091c page under three fixed aurora radial-gradient glows (mint rgba(94,242,198,.35) top-left, periwinkle rgba(122,162,255,.32) top-right, violet rgba(201,132,255,.3) bottom-center); frosted-glass .card surfaces (rgba(255,255,255,.05) fill, 1px rgba(180,220,255,.14) border, backdrop-filter blur(24px) saturate(160%), deep shadow with inner top highlight); accents exactly --accent:#5ef2c6 mint, --accent-2:#7aa2ff blue, --accent-3:#c984ff violet with --grad:linear-gradient(135deg,#5ef2c6,#7aa2ff 50%,#c984ff) clipped into headline and hero-number text via .gradient-text; radii 20/14/28px; text #e8f0ff / #b4c4e4 / #6a7a9e; fonts Inter + Noto Sans SC (sans/display, 800–900 headline weight), Playfair Display + Noto Serif SC (italic pull quotes only), JetBrains Mono (code, axis labels, counters) from Google Fonts @import — the only external references; no Chart.js, no icon fonts, no external images. Structure: a single self-contained HTML file; horizontal scroll-snap deck of <section class="slide"> pages, each exactly 100vw×100vh at a 16:9 1280×720 baseline with 72px 96px padding and no internal scrolling; fixed .deck-header / .deck-footer chrome and a gradient .progress-bar; keyboard runtime with ←/→/Space/PageUp/PageDown/Home/End navigation and #/N hash routing (theme-locked — no T cycling). Compose pages from the upstream 31-layout catalog (cover → toc → section-divider → content layouts → cta/thanks; the seed demonstrates cover, toc, section-divider, stat-highlight, two-column, kpi-grid, chart-bar, chart-line, process-steps, big-quote, thanks). Hero numbers always wear .gradient-text; CSS bar charts use gradient bars for the protagonist and translucent .bar.ghost for baselines; SVG line charts use the mint→blue→violet gradient stroke inside a glass card; section dividers carry the ghost rgba(255,255,255,.06) .section-num numeral; at most one anim-rise-in hero plus one anim-stagger-list per slide. Write real content with real numbers (no lorem ipsum), replace all fictional Borealis Grid demo content, and put 1–3 sentences of speaker notes in each slide's hidden .notes block.
query.zh-CN: 用「极光玻璃」体系为 {{audience}} 做一套关于 {{topic}} 的 {{deckType}}（页数 {{slideCount}}）：基于 lewislulu/html-ppt-skill 的 aurora 主题、锁定为唯一皮肤。从种子 example.html 出发，只替换幻灯片内容，绝不重写样式与脚本，也不引入 token 表之外的颜色和字体：近黑靛底 #06091c + 薄荷/长春花蓝/紫罗兰三重极光光晕，blur(24px) saturate(160%) 毛玻璃卡片，#5ef2c6/#7aa2ff/#c984ff 三色与 mint→blue→violet 渐变标题，20px 圆角，Inter + Noto Sans SC / Playfair Display / JetBrains Mono 三槽字体（仅 Google Fonts @import 外链）。横向滚动单文件 HTML，一屏一页不滚动，键盘翻页 + #/N 哈希路由（主题锁定、无 T 换肤）；版式从上游 31 版式目录选取，图表用纯 CSS/SVG 重建（渐变柱为主角、半透明 ghost 柱为基线），巨型数字一律渐变字，真实内容不用 lorem ipsum，替换全部虚构的 Borealis Grid 演示内容，每页在隐藏的 .notes 里写演讲备注。完整规格以英文 query 为准。

exampleOutputs.title: Aurora Glass · Borealis Grid Demo Deck
